name: Healthco Healthcare And Wellness Reit
analysis: HCW's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.7050, stop A$0.6633, target A$0.7850 (1.92:1) — then trail it.
